TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Yanaihara Tadao == Yanaihara Tadao , o cecay hakasi no Dipong to kicay ato satao' no picalap hakasi. Itiya 1951 miheca 12 folad tangasa 1957 miheca 12 folad mala'a'isidan no Tokyo daykako; o kaying no Dipong haksuyin; mapakaolah to toloay tamohong at cecay parina'an. Masowal to "Cifaloco'ay no Dipong a tamdaw" sanay. 'Orip Kalakapahan to'ek I 1893 miheca 1 folad 27 romi'ad, masofoc ci Yanaihara Tadao i Ehime ken Ochi-gun Tonda-mura Shikoku no Dipong; o mama nao tayraay to i Kyoto minanam to sakala ising, saka o saratay i Ehime ken a isingan. 11 ko mihecaan mitilid i Kope sokakko kotoka, saka tosa miheca maala to Hyoko kenritsu Kope cukakko limaay miheca. I 1910 miheca, aala ko Kyusei daiici kotokakko, i pikerid no kakaay ci Shisen seibu mikihatiya to 'a'isidan ci Shin Watanabe kome-en a pisa'osi kay (Dokusho kurabu) sa'opo, saka tosa miheca mikihatiya to ni Uchimura kanzo Seisho kenkyukai i loma' to pa'aliwacan, ikor malo awaayay ko kiwkay Kristokiw a mitooray. I 1913 miheca 9 folad, micomod i Tokyo teikoku daikaku hogakubu mitilid, mafiyol ni Shin Watanabe kome-en ko katayra ala singsi to "satao' no picalap" (Shokuminchiseisaku) a hakasi itiya. Lakapahan to'ek I 1916 miheca, masawad to Daykako i, matayal i "Bieji kŇćgyŇć kenkyŇęjo" no Sumitomo gurŇępu itiya; i 1920 miheca 3 folad, malasingsi no TŇćkyŇćteikokudaigaku keizaigakubu, 10 folad maocor tayra i Europ Ammilika mitilid, itiya i London a Toynbee Hall ato London Seiji keizaigakubu citodongay mitilid; i 1923 miheca 2 folad minokay, toya mihecaan 8 folad macakat mala hakasi, micada to nipasafana' ni Shin Watanabe kome-en ko katayra ala singsi to "satao' no picalap" (Shokuminchiseisaku) pasifana'. I pitilid ningra i roma kitakit i, misa'imer cingra to pakayniay no ka'etipay nisatekeday (nicowatay) picalap a sakowan, ka o syakay kakak ko pinengneng caay ko pisadadahal to nisatekeday sakowan no Dipong to niyah a sra ano eca sa'icel mikowan, saan o no Kristokiw ko pikihar to nicalapan piepec to syakay a pikelot, mipasimo'ecelay ko misakakinih to nicalapan a tamdaw. I 1920 miheca, mafiyol to harateng ni Marx, adihay ko pacefad ningra to sihong a kacowat ato nisatekeday pikowan no Dipong, nicalapay pikowan a pahimerac. Mipasifana' sa oni Adam Smith "sakadafoh no kitakit", ni David Ricardo a "Kicay ha", ni Vladimir Lenin "nisatekeday pikowan" a no'etipay a kicayha ko sapasifana', saan o ni J. A. Hobson "nisatekeday sakowan" ko patatengaan mikilim to nai nisatekeday sakowan a kalali'aca kinaira i nicalapan ko saka picalap pikingkiw. I 1926 miheca (ShŇćwa gan'nen), o soto no Taywan ci Izawa Taka o mala Tokyo sico i; paini ci Yanaihara Tadao to "tosa so'ot finawlan no Tokyo si ato sepatay so'ot finawlan no kanatal" sanay a tilid tayra i "Teikoku daigaku zasshi" mihapiw, pacefad to nisatekeday pikowan a Sotofo no Taywan. I 1927 miheca (Showa 2-nen) 3 folad tangasa 4 folad, tayra cingra i Taywan misolap; misolap maledef i Taypi, Taoyin, Ciapansan, Taycong, Tongse, Cusan, Ciayi, Taynan, Takao, Pintong, Sinco, Yilan, kalingko, Taytong a niyaro'. minengneng cingra to Kaysya, omah, pitilidan, niyaro' no yincumin, pakayni ci Cai Peihuoan miliso' to kakeridan no Taywan, nika i pihapiw ningra makantok no imeng no Dipong, matena' no miliyangay sakapot "awaayay ko dafong a sakapot"; maratatenga cangra ca Lin Xiantang, aci Cai Peihuo to picikeroh to misdeal to finawlan a onto, caay ka pacekil ko misatekeday pikowan no sotofo no Taywan. Patikol i Dipong, itira cingra patilid haca cingra i "Teikoku daigaku zasshi" to mihapiw "saki Taywan no sici a pakonira" sanay a tilid, mipacefad to cango'otay no Taywan to sici pakonira ato nisowalan citodongay:awaay ko niyah Taywan tamdaw a sinpong, halo i Tokyo nipasadakan no Taywan a "sinpong no Taywan finawlan" caay ka nga'ay patayra milinah i Taywan; halo, o paini ningra "caay ko kafana'en koya misatekiday to sici a tamdaw, katayra ho i Taywan a minengneng." I 1937 miheca (Showa 13-nen), macowat ko demak no Rokokyo jiken itiya, itira cingra i "Chuo yoron" mihapiw to "sakanga'ay no kitakit" (Kokka riso), paheci to sakanga'ay no kitakit i sakimo'ecelay, sakaeca kaenec no ki'emelay i sasafaay a tamdaw ko solongoc; toya mihecaan 12 folad, papelo itira i Tokyo teikoku daigaku to sapisawad hapiw, milaha cingra i ka'ayaw "mi'orip to sakanga'ay no kitakit" (Kokka riso), 'ayawen ko pitadem tonini a kitakit." saan. 1945 miheca 11 folad, mapatiyol palowad ko kalahakasi i Tokyo daigaku; i 1946 miheca 8 folad, citodong to kakeridan no Tokyo daigaku shakai kagakuken kyujo; i 1947 miheca, pakaala to Tokyo daigaku keizaigaku hakushi; 1948 miheca, maala ko kala Keizai daijin (Keizaigaku bu-cho); 1949 miheca, mala Shodai bungakubu-gaku bucho; 1951 miheca, mala Dai 16-dai Tokyo daigaku socho ('a'isidan no Tokyo daikaku), tangsa 1957 miheca ira ko 2 liyad polong 6 mihecaan; 1952 miheca, o pikiki no mitiliday itiya micomod i pitilidan misolap ko imeng (Tokyo daigaku po po Ra jiken), misa'imer cingra to niyah pikowan to pakoniyah a pikingkiw sanay pa'icel. Kato'asan miheca I 1958 miheca, cingangan to Meiyo kyoju; 1961 miheca, ciadada to kang no fitoka a mapatay, 68 miheca ko 'orip i hekal. Mapatireng laloma' no Tokyo daigaku ko Yanaihara Tadao fawahan, itatihi mapatireng ko "Yanaihara Tadao Niwa". Pahemak ci Ienaga saburo o Rekishiya no Dipong "o faloco' no Dipong a tamdaw" saan. Pahemem ci Rin shenjin o matiliday no Taywan "talacowa caay ko masa Max (Marukusu) a tamdaw, ka o "okak ko sapitilid, o cohel ko cengel", miliyang to picalap milood to Congko; talacowa ciraraw to mikowanay, macefis ko kalahakasi malasingsi, oyaan to ko faloco', o lalekoan no to'as a pinangan" . Nitilidan 4. John Atkinson Hobson Ś≤©ś≥ĘśĖáŚļę 1951

o~u mama nao~u tajraaj to~u i kjo~uto~u minanam to~u saka…ĺa isiŇč, saka o~u sarataj i …ôńßim…ô k…ôn a isiŇčan. ** ko~u mińß…ô ¶aan miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ i ko~up…ô so~ukakko~u ko~uto~uka, saka to~usa mińß…ô ¶a maa…ĺa to~u ńßjo~uko~u k…ônritso~u~u ko~up…ô ¶o~u~ukakko~u …ĺimaaj mińß…ô ¶a. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, aa…ĺa ko~u kjo~u~us…ôi …¨~…ģaii ¶i ko~uto~ukakko~u, i pik…ôri…¨~…ģ no~u kakaaj ¶i sńßis…ôn s…ôib~b~vo~u~u mikińßatija to~u °a °isi…¨~…ģan ¶i sńßin watanab~b~v…ô ko~um…ô-…ôn a pisa °o~usi kaj (…¨~…ģo~uko~u~usńßo~u ko~u~urab~b~vo~u~u) sa °o~upo~u, saka to~usa mińß…ô ¶a mikińßatija to~u ni o~u~u ¶ńßimo~u~ura kan*o~u s…ôisńßo~u k…ônkjo~u~ukai i …ĺo~uma ° to~u pa °a…ĺiwa ¶an, iko~ur ma…ĺo~u awaajaj ko~u kiwkaj kristo~ukiw a mito~uo~uraj. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i to~ukjo~u t…ôiko~uko~u~u …¨~…ģaikako~u~u ńßo~u*ako~u~ub~b~vo~u~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, mafijo~u…ĺ ni sńßin watanab~b~v…ô ko~um…ô-…ôn ko~u katajra a…ĺa siŇčsi to~u "satao~u ° no~u pi ¶a…ĺap" (sńßo~uko~u~umin ¶ńßis…ôisako~u~u) a ńßakasi itija. …ĺakapańßan to~u °…ôk i **** mińß…ô ¶a, masawa…¨~…ģ to~u …¨~…ģajkako~u i, mataja…ĺ i "b~b~vi…ôji k**j* k…ônkj*jo~u" no~u so~u~umito~umo~u *o~u~ur*po~u~u itija; i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ma…ĺasiŇčsi no~u t*kj*t…ôiko~uko~u~u…¨~…ģai*ako~u~u k…ôi*ai*ako~u~ub~b~vo~u~u, ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ mao~u ¶o~ur tajra i …ôo~u~uro~up ammi…ĺika miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, itija i …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un a to~ujnb~b~v…ô…ô ńßa…ĺ…ĺ ato~u …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un s…ôiji k…ôi*ai*ako~u~ub~b~vo~u~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ; i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ mino~ukaj, to~uja mińß…ô ¶aan * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ma ¶akat ma…ĺa ńßakasi, mi ¶a…¨~…ģa to~u nipasafana ° ni sńßin watanab~b~v…ô ko~um…ô-…ôn ko~u katajra a…ĺa siŇčsi to~u "satao~u ° no~u pi ¶a…ĺap" (sńßo~uko~u~umin ¶ńßis…ôisako~u~u) pasifana °. i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ niŇčra i ro~uma kitakit i, misa °im…ôr ¶iŇčra to~u pakajniaj no~u ka °…ôtipaj nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj (ni ¶o~uwataj) pi ¶a…ĺap a sako~uwan, ka o~u sjakaj kakak ko~u pin…ôŇčn…ôŇč ¶aaj ko~u pisa…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģańßa…ĺ to~u nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj sako~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u nijańß a sra ano~u …ô ¶a sa °i ¶…ô…ĺ miko~uwan, saan o~u no~u kristo~ukiw ko~u pikińßar to~u ni ¶a…ĺapan pi…ôp…ô ¶ to~u sjakaj a pik…ô…ĺo~ut, mipasimo~u °…ô ¶…ô…ĺaj ko~u misakakinińß to~u ni ¶a…ĺapan a tam…¨~…ģaw. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, mafijo~u…ĺ to~u ńßarat…ôŇč ni marx, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u pa ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģ niŇčra to~u sińßo~uŇč a ka ¶o~uwat ato~u nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj piko~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, ni ¶a…ĺapaj piko~uwan a pańßim…ôra ¶. mipasifana ° sa o~uni a…¨~…ģam smitńß "saka…¨~…ģafo~uńß no~u kitakit", ni …¨~…ģab~vi…¨~…ģ ri ¶ar…¨~…ģo~u a "ki ¶aj ńßa", ni b~v…ĺa…¨~…ģimir …ĺ…ônin "nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj piko~uwan" a no~u °…ôtipaj a ki ¶ajńßa ko~u sapasifana °, saan o~u ni *. a. ńßo~ub~b~vso~un "nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj sako~uwan" ko~u patat…ôŇčaan miki…ĺim to~u nai nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj sako~uwan a ka…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶a kinaira i ni ¶a…ĺapan ko~u saka pi ¶a…ĺap pikiŇčkiw. i **** mińß…ô ¶a (sńß*wa *an °n…ôn), o~u so~uto~u no~u tajwan ¶i i*awa taka o~u ma…ĺa to~ukjo~u si ¶o~u i; paini ¶i janaińßara ta…¨~…ģao~u to~u "to~usa so~u °o~ut finaw…ĺan no~u to~ukjo~u si ato~u s…ôpataj so~u °o~ut finaw…ĺan no~u kanata…ĺ" sanaj a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ tajra i "t…ôiko~uko~u~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u *assńßi" mińßapiw, pa ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģ to~u nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj piko~uwan a so~uto~ufo~u no~u tajwan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a (sńßo~uwa *-n…ôn) * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ taŇčasa * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, tajra ¶iŇčra i tajwan miso~u…ĺap; miso~u…ĺap ma…ĺ…ô…¨~…ģ…ôf i tajpi, tao~ujin, ¶iapansan, taj ¶o~uŇč, to~uŇčs…ô, ¶o~u~usan, ¶iaji, tajnan, takao~u, pinto~uŇč, sin ¶o~u, ji…ĺan, ka…ĺiŇčko~u, tajto~uŇč a nijaro~u °. min…ôŇčn…ôŇč ¶iŇčra to~u kajsja, o~umańß, piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan, nijaro~u ° no~u jin ¶o~u~umin, pakajni ¶i ¶ai p…ôińßo~u~uo~uan mi…ĺiso~u ° to~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u tajwan, nika i pińßapiw niŇčra makanto~uk no~u im…ôŇč no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, mat…ôna ° no~u mi…ĺijaŇčaj sakapo~ut "awaajaj ko~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč a sakapo~ut"; maratat…ôŇča ¶aŇčra ¶a …ĺin xiantaŇč, a ¶i ¶ai p…ôińßo~u~uo~u to~u pi ¶ik…ôro~uńß to~u mis…¨~…ģ…ôa…ĺ to~u finaw…ĺan a o~unto~u, ¶aaj ka pa ¶…ôki…ĺ ko~u misat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj piko~uwan no~u so~uto~ufo~u no~u tajwan. patiko~u…ĺ i …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, itira ¶iŇčra pati…ĺi…¨~…ģ ńßa ¶a ¶iŇčra i "t…ôiko~uko~u~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u *assńßi" to~u mińßapiw "saki tajwan no~u si ¶i a pako~unira" sanaj a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, mipa ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģ to~u ¶aŇčo~u °o~utaj no~u tajwan to~u si ¶i pako~unira ato~u niso~uwa…ĺan ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj:awaaj ko~u nijańß tajwan tam…¨~…ģaw a sinpo~uŇč, ńßa…ĺo~u i to~ukjo~u nipasa…¨~…ģakan no~u tajwan a "sinpo~uŇč no~u tajwan finaw…ĺan" ¶aaj ka Ňča °aj patajra mi…ĺinańß i tajwan; ńßa…ĺo~u, o~u paini niŇčra " ¶aaj ko~u kafana °…ôn ko~uja misat…ôki…¨~…ģaj to~u si ¶i a tam…¨~…ģaw, katajra ńßo~u i tajwan a min…ôŇčn…ôŇč." i **** mińß…ô ¶a (sńßo~uwa **-n…ôn), ma ¶o~uwat ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u ro~uko~ukjo~u jik…ôn itija, itira ¶iŇčra i " ¶ńßo~u~uo~u jo~uro~un" mińßapiw to~u "sakaŇča °aj no~u kitakit" (ko~ukka riso~u), pańß…ô ¶i to~u sakaŇča °aj no~u kitakit i sakimo~u °…ô ¶…ô…ĺaj, saka…ô ¶a ka…ôn…ô ¶ no~u ki °…ôm…ô…ĺaj i sasafaaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u so~u…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶; to~uja mińß…ô ¶aan ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, pap…ô…ĺo~u itira i to~ukjo~u t…ôiko~uko~u~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u to~u sapisawa…¨~…ģ ńßapiw, mi…ĺańßa ¶iŇčra i ka °ajaw "mi °o~urip to~u sakaŇča °aj no~u kitakit" (ko~ukka riso~u), °ajaw…ôn ko~u pita…¨~…ģ…ôm to~unini a kitakit." saan. **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, mapatijo~u…ĺ pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ ko~u ka…ĺańßakasi i to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u; i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u sńßakai ka*ako~u~uk…ôn kjo~u~ujo~u; i **** mińß…ô ¶a, pakaa…ĺa to~u to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u k…ôi*ai*ako~u~u ńßako~u~usńßi; **** mińß…ô ¶a, maa…ĺa ko~u ka…ĺa k…ôi*ai …¨~…ģaijin (k…ôi*ai*ako~u~u b~b~vo~u~u- ¶ńßo~u); **** mińß…ô ¶a, ma…ĺa sńßo~u…¨~…ģai b~b~vo~u~uŇčako~u~ub~b~vo~u~u-*ako~u~u b~b~vo~u~u ¶ńßo~u; **** mińß…ô ¶a, ma…ĺa …¨~…ģai **-…¨~…ģai to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u so~u ¶ńßo~u ( °a °isi…¨~…ģan no~u to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģaikako~u~u), taŇčsa **** mińß…ô ¶a ira ko~u * …ĺija…¨~…ģ po~u…ĺo~uŇč * mińß…ô ¶aan; **** mińß…ô ¶a, o~u pikiki no~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj itija mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan miso~u…ĺap ko~u im…ôŇč (to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u po~u po~u ra jik…ôn), misa °im…ôr ¶iŇčra to~u nijańß piko~uwan to~u pako~unijańß a pikiŇčkiw sanaj pa °i ¶…ô…ĺ. kato~u °asan mińß…ô ¶a i **** mińß…ô ¶a, ¶iŇčaŇčan to~u m…ôijo~u kjo~ujo~u~u; **** mińß…ô ¶a, ¶ia…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~u kaŇč no~u fito~uka a mapataj, ** mińß…ô ¶a ko~u °o~urip i ńß…ôka…ĺ. mapatir…ôŇč …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u ko~u janaińßara ta…¨~…ģao~u fawańßan, itatińßi mapatir…ôŇč ko~u "janaińßara ta…¨~…ģao~u niwa". pańß…ômak ¶i i…ôna*a sab~b~vo~u~uro~u o~u r…ôkisńßija no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč "o~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw" saan. pańß…ôm…ôm ¶i rin sńß…ônjin o~u mati…ĺi…¨~…ģaj no~u tajwan "ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ¶aaj ko~u masa max (maro~u~uko~u~uso~u~u) a tam…¨~…ģaw, ka o~u "o~ukak ko~u sapiti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, o~u ¶o~uńß…ô…ĺ ko~u ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ", mi…ĺijaŇč to~u pi ¶a…ĺap mi…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ¶o~uŇčko~u; ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ¶iraraw to~u miko~uwanaj, ma ¶…ôfis ko~u ka…ĺańßakasi ma…ĺasiŇčsi, o~ujaan to~u ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, o~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôko~uan no~u to~u °as a pinaŇčan" . niti…ĺi…¨~…ģan *. *o~uńßn atkinso~un ńßo~ub~b~vso~un **** ****
S.FORM: == Yanaihara Tadao == Yanaihara Tadao , o cecay hakasi no Dipong to kicay ato satao' no picalap hakasi. Itiya 1951 miheca 12 folad tangasa 1957 miheca 12 folad mala'a'isidan no Tokyo daykako; o kaying no Dipong haksuyin; mapakaolah to toloay tamohong at cecay parina'an. Masowal to "Cifaloco'ay no Dipong a tamdaw" sanay. 'Orip Kalakapahan to'ek I 1893 miheca 1 folad 27 romi'ad, masofoc ci Yanaihara Tadao i Ehime ken Ochi-gun Tonda-mura Shikoku no Dipong; o mama nao tayraay to i Kyoto minanam to sakala ising, saka o saratay i Ehime ken a isingan. 11 ko mihecaan mitilid i Kope sokakko kotoka, saka tosa miheca maala to Hyoko kenritsu Kope cukakko limaay miheca. I 1910 miheca, aala ko Kyusei daiici kotokakko, i pikerid no kakaay ci Shisen seibu mikihatiya to 'a'isidan ci Shin Watanabe kome-en a pisa'osi kay (Dokusho kurabu) sa'opo, saka tosa miheca mikihatiya to ni Uchimura kanzo Seisho kenkyukai i loma' to pa'aliwacan, ikor malo awaayay ko kiwkay Kristokiw a mitooray. I 1913 miheca 9 folad, micomod i Tokyo teikoku daikaku hogakubu mitilid, mafiyol ni Shin Watanabe kome-en ko katayra ala singsi to "satao' no picalap" (Shokuminchiseisaku) a hakasi itiya. Lakapahan to'ek I 1916 miheca, masawad to Daykako i, matayal i "Bieji kŇćgyŇć kenkyŇęjo" no Sumitomo gurŇępu itiya; i 1920 miheca 3 folad, malasingsi no TŇćkyŇćteikokudaigaku keizaigakubu, 10 folad maocor tayra i Europ Ammilika mitilid, itiya i London a Toynbee Hall ato London Seiji keizaigakubu citodongay mitilid; i 1923 miheca 2 folad minokay, toya mihecaan 8 folad macakat mala hakasi, micada to nipasafana' ni Shin Watanabe kome-en ko katayra ala singsi to "satao' no picalap" (Shokuminchiseisaku) pasifana'. I pitilid ningra i roma kitakit i, misa'imer cingra to pakayniay no ka'etipay nisatekeday (nicowatay) picalap a sakowan, ka o syakay kakak ko pinengneng caay ko pisadadahal to nisatekeday sakowan no Dipong to niyah a sra ano eca sa'icel mikowan, saan o no Kristokiw ko pikihar to nicalapan piepec to syakay a pikelot, mipasimo'ecelay ko misakakinih to nicalapan a tamdaw. I 1920 miheca, mafiyol to harateng ni Marx, adihay ko pacefad ningra to sihong a kacowat ato nisatekeday pikowan no Dipong, nicalapay pikowan a pahimerac. Mipasifana' sa oni Adam Smith "sakadafoh no kitakit", ni David Ricardo a "Kicay ha", ni Vladimir Lenin "nisatekeday pikowan" a no'etipay a kicayha ko sapasifana', saan o ni J. A. Hobson "nisatekeday sakowan" ko patatengaan mikilim to nai nisatekeday sakowan a kalali'aca kinaira i nicalapan ko saka picalap pikingkiw. I 1926 miheca (ShŇćwa gan'nen), o soto no Taywan ci Izawa Taka o mala Tokyo sico i; paini ci Yanaihara Tadao to "tosa so'ot finawlan no Tokyo si ato sepatay so'ot finawlan no kanatal" sanay a tilid tayra i "Teikoku daigaku zasshi" mihapiw, pacefad to nisatekeday pikowan a Sotofo no Taywan. I 1927 miheca (Showa 2-nen) 3 folad tangasa 4 folad, tayra cingra i Taywan misolap; misolap maledef i Taypi, Taoyin, Ciapansan, Taycong, Tongse, Cusan, Ciayi, Taynan, Takao, Pintong, Sinco, Yilan, kalingko, Taytong a niyaro'. minengneng cingra to Kaysya, omah, pitilidan, niyaro' no yincumin, pakayni ci Cai Peihuoan miliso' to kakeridan no Taywan, nika i pihapiw ningra makantok no imeng no Dipong, matena' no miliyangay sakapot "awaayay ko dafong a sakapot"; maratatenga cangra ca Lin Xiantang, aci Cai Peihuo to picikeroh to misdeal to finawlan a onto, caay ka pacekil ko misatekeday pikowan no sotofo no Taywan. Patikol i Dipong, itira cingra patilid haca cingra i "Teikoku daigaku zasshi" to mihapiw "saki Taywan no sici a pakonira" sanay a tilid, mipacefad to cango'otay no Taywan to sici pakonira ato nisowalan citodongay:awaay ko niyah Taywan tamdaw a sinpong, halo i Tokyo nipasadakan no Taywan a "sinpong no Taywan finawlan" caay ka nga'ay patayra milinah i Taywan; halo, o paini ningra "caay ko kafana'en koya misatekiday to sici a tamdaw, katayra ho i Taywan a minengneng." I 1937 miheca (Showa 13-nen), macowat ko demak no Rokokyo jiken itiya, itira cingra i "Chuo yoron" mihapiw to "sakanga'ay no kitakit" (Kokka riso), paheci to sakanga'ay no kitakit i sakimo'ecelay, sakaeca kaenec no ki'emelay i sasafaay a tamdaw ko solongoc; toya mihecaan 12 folad, papelo itira i Tokyo teikoku daigaku to sapisawad hapiw, milaha cingra i ka'ayaw "mi'orip to sakanga'ay no kitakit" (Kokka riso), 'ayawen ko pitadem tonini a kitakit." saan. 1945 miheca 11 folad, mapatiyol palowad ko kalahakasi i Tokyo daigaku; i 1946 miheca 8 folad, citodong to kakeridan no Tokyo daigaku shakai kagakuken kyujo; i 1947 miheca, pakaala to Tokyo daigaku keizaigaku hakushi; 1948 miheca, maala ko kala Keizai daijin (Keizaigaku bu-cho); 1949 miheca, mala Shodai bungakubu-gaku bucho; 1951 miheca, mala Dai 16-dai Tokyo daigaku socho ('a'isidan no Tokyo daikaku), tangsa 1957 miheca ira ko 2 liyad polong 6 mihecaan; 1952 miheca, o pikiki no mitiliday itiya micomod i pitilidan misolap ko imeng (Tokyo daigaku po po Ra jiken), misa'imer cingra to niyah pikowan to pakoniyah a pikingkiw sanay pa'icel. Kato'asan miheca I 1958 miheca, cingangan to Meiyo kyoju; 1961 miheca, ciadada to kang no fitoka a mapatay, 68 miheca ko 'orip i hekal. Mapatireng laloma' no Tokyo daigaku ko Yanaihara Tadao fawahan, itatihi mapatireng ko "Yanaihara Tadao Niwa". Pahemak ci Ienaga saburo o Rekishiya no Dipong "o faloco' no Dipong a tamdaw" saan. Pahemem ci Rin shenjin o matiliday no Taywan "talacowa caay ko masa Max (Marukusu) a tamdaw, ka o "okak ko sapitilid, o cohel ko cengel", miliyang to picalap milood to Congko; talacowa ciraraw to mikowanay, macefis ko kalahakasi malasingsi, oyaan to ko faloco', o lalekoan no to'as a pinangan" . Nitilidan 4. John Atkinson Hobson Ś≤©ś≥ĘśĖáŚļę 1951
S.PHON: == janaińßara ta…¨~…ģao~u == janaińßara ta…¨~…ģao~u , o~u ¶…ô ¶aj ńßakasi no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u ki ¶aj ato~u satao~u ° no~u pi ¶a…ĺap ńßakasi. itija **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ taŇčasa **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ma…ĺa °a °isi…¨~…ģan no~u to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģajkako~u; i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ mino~ukaj, to~uja mińß…ô ¶aan * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ma ¶akat ma…ĺa ńßakasi, mi ¶a…¨~…ģa to~u nipasafana ° ni sńßin watanab~b~v…ô ko~um…ô-…ôn ko~u katajra a…ĺa siŇčsi to~u "satao~u ° no~u pi ¶a…ĺap" (sńßo~uko~u~umin ¶ńßis…ôisako~u~u) pasifana °. i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ niŇčra i ro~uma kitakit i, misa °im…ôr ¶iŇčra to~u pakajniaj no~u ka °…ôtipaj nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj (ni ¶o~uwataj) pi ¶a…ĺap a sako~uwan, ka o~u sjakaj kakak ko~u pin…ôŇčn…ôŇč ¶aaj ko~u pisa…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģańßa…ĺ to~u nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj sako~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u nijańß a sra ano~u …ô ¶a sa °i ¶…ô…ĺ miko~uwan, saan o~u no~u kristo~ukiw ko~u pikińßar to~u ni ¶a…ĺapan pi…ôp…ô ¶ to~u sjakaj a pik…ô…ĺo~ut, mipasimo~u °…ô ¶…ô…ĺaj ko~u misakakinińß to~u ni ¶a…ĺapan a tam…¨~…ģaw. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, mafijo~u…ĺ to~u ńßarat…ôŇč ni marx, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u pa ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģ niŇčra to~u sińßo~uŇč a ka ¶o~uwat ato~u nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj piko~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, ni ¶a…ĺapaj piko~uwan a pańßim…ôra ¶. mipasifana ° sa o~uni a…¨~…ģam smitńß "saka…¨~…ģafo~uńß no~u kitakit", ni …¨~…ģab~vi…¨~…ģ ri ¶ar…¨~…ģo~u a "ki ¶aj ńßa", ni b~v…ĺa…¨~…ģimir …ĺ…ônin "nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj piko~uwan" a no~u °…ôtipaj a ki ¶ajńßa ko~u sapasifana °, saan o~u ni *. a. ńßo~ub~b~vso~un "nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj sako~uwan" ko~u patat…ôŇčaan miki…ĺim to~u nai nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj sako~uwan a ka…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶a kinaira i ni ¶a…ĺapan ko~u saka pi ¶a…ĺap pikiŇčkiw. i **** mińß…ô ¶a (sńß*wa *an °n…ôn), o~u so~uto~u no~u tajwan ¶i i*awa taka o~u ma…ĺa to~ukjo~u si ¶o~u i; paini ¶i janaińßara ta…¨~…ģao~u to~u "to~usa so~u °o~ut finaw…ĺan no~u to~ukjo~u si ato~u s…ôpataj so~u °o~ut finaw…ĺan no~u kanata…ĺ" sanaj a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ tajra i "t…ôiko~uko~u~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u *assńßi" mińßapiw, pa ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģ to~u nisat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj piko~uwan a so~uto~ufo~u no~u tajwan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a (sńßo~uwa *-n…ôn) * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ taŇčasa * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, tajra ¶iŇčra i tajwan miso~u…ĺap; miso~u…ĺap ma…ĺ…ô…¨~…ģ…ôf i tajpi, tao~ujin, ¶iapansan, taj ¶o~uŇč, to~uŇčs…ô, ¶o~u~usan, ¶iaji, tajnan, takao~u, pinto~uŇč, sin ¶o~u, ji…ĺan, ka…ĺiŇčko~u, tajto~uŇč a nijaro~u °. min…ôŇčn…ôŇč ¶iŇčra to~u kajsja, o~umańß, piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan, nijaro~u ° no~u jin ¶o~u~umin, pakajni ¶i ¶ai p…ôińßo~u~uo~uan mi…ĺiso~u ° to~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u tajwan, nika i pińßapiw niŇčra makanto~uk no~u im…ôŇč no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, mat…ôna ° no~u mi…ĺijaŇčaj sakapo~ut "awaajaj ko~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč a sakapo~ut"; maratat…ôŇča ¶aŇčra ¶a …ĺin xiantaŇč, a ¶i ¶ai p…ôińßo~u~uo~u to~u pi ¶ik…ôro~uńß to~u mis…¨~…ģ…ôa…ĺ to~u finaw…ĺan a o~unto~u, ¶aaj ka pa ¶…ôki…ĺ ko~u misat…ôk…ô…¨~…ģaj piko~uwan no~u so~uto~ufo~u no~u tajwan. patiko~u…ĺ i …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, itira ¶iŇčra pati…ĺi…¨~…ģ ńßa ¶a ¶iŇčra i "t…ôiko~uko~u~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u *assńßi" to~u mińßapiw "saki tajwan no~u si ¶i a pako~unira" sanaj a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, mipa ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģ to~u ¶aŇčo~u °o~utaj no~u tajwan to~u si ¶i pako~unira ato~u niso~uwa…ĺan ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj:awaaj ko~u nijańß tajwan tam…¨~…ģaw a sinpo~uŇč, ńßa…ĺo~u i to~ukjo~u nipasa…¨~…ģakan no~u tajwan a "sinpo~uŇč no~u tajwan finaw…ĺan" ¶aaj ka Ňča °aj patajra mi…ĺinańß i tajwan; ńßa…ĺo~u, o~u paini niŇčra " ¶aaj ko~u kafana °…ôn ko~uja misat…ôki…¨~…ģaj to~u si ¶i a tam…¨~…ģaw, katajra ńßo~u i tajwan a min…ôŇčn…ôŇč." i **** mińß…ô ¶a (sńßo~uwa **-n…ôn), ma ¶o~uwat ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u ro~uko~ukjo~u jik…ôn itija, itira ¶iŇčra i " ¶ńßo~u~uo~u jo~uro~un" mińßapiw to~u "sakaŇča °aj no~u kitakit" (ko~ukka riso~u), pańß…ô ¶i to~u sakaŇča °aj no~u kitakit i sakimo~u °…ô ¶…ô…ĺaj, saka…ô ¶a ka…ôn…ô ¶ no~u ki °…ôm…ô…ĺaj i sasafaaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u so~u…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶; to~uja mińß…ô ¶aan ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, pap…ô…ĺo~u itira i to~ukjo~u t…ôiko~uko~u~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u to~u sapisawa…¨~…ģ ńßapiw, mi…ĺańßa ¶iŇčra i ka °ajaw "mi °o~urip to~u sakaŇča °aj no~u kitakit" (ko~ukka riso~u), °ajaw…ôn ko~u pita…¨~…ģ…ôm to~unini a kitakit." saan. **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, mapatijo~u…ĺ pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ ko~u ka…ĺańßakasi i to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u; i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u sńßakai ka*ako~u~uk…ôn kjo~u~ujo~u; i **** mińß…ô ¶a, pakaa…ĺa to~u to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u k…ôi*ai*ako~u~u ńßako~u~usńßi; **** mińß…ô ¶a, maa…ĺa ko~u ka…ĺa k…ôi*ai …¨~…ģaijin (k…ôi*ai*ako~u~u b~b~vo~u~u- ¶ńßo~u); **** mińß…ô ¶a, ma…ĺa sńßo~u…¨~…ģai b~b~vo~u~uŇčako~u~ub~b~vo~u~u-*ako~u~u b~b~vo~u~u ¶ńßo~u; **** mińß…ô ¶a, ma…ĺa …¨~…ģai **-…¨~…ģai to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u so~u ¶ńßo~u ( °a °isi…¨~…ģan no~u to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģaikako~u~u), taŇčsa **** mińß…ô ¶a ira ko~u * …ĺija…¨~…ģ po~u…ĺo~uŇč * mińß…ô ¶aan; **** mińß…ô ¶a, o~u pikiki no~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj itija mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan miso~u…ĺap ko~u im…ôŇč (to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u po~u po~u ra jik…ôn), misa °im…ôr ¶iŇčra to~u nijańß piko~uwan to~u pako~unijańß a pikiŇčkiw sanaj pa °i ¶…ô…ĺ. kato~u °asan mińß…ô ¶a i **** mińß…ô ¶a, ¶iŇčaŇčan to~u m…ôijo~u kjo~ujo~u~u; **** mińß…ô ¶a, ¶ia…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~u kaŇč no~u fito~uka a mapataj, ** mińß…ô ¶a ko~u °o~urip i ńß…ôka…ĺ. mapatir…ôŇč …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u to~ukjo~u …¨~…ģai*ako~u~u ko~u janaińßara ta…¨~…ģao~u fawańßan, itatińßi mapatir…ôŇč ko~u "janaińßara ta…¨~…ģao~u niwa". pańß…ômak ¶i i…ôna*a sab~b~vo~u~uro~u o~u r…ôkisńßija no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč "o~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw" saan. pańß…ôm…ôm ¶i rin sńß…ônjin o~u mati…ĺi…¨~…ģaj no~u tajwan "ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ¶aaj ko~u masa max (maro~u~uko~u~uso~u~u) a tam…¨~…ģaw, ka o~u "o~ukak ko~u sapiti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, o~u ¶o~uńß…ô…ĺ ko~u ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ", mi…ĺijaŇč to~u pi ¶a…ĺap mi…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ¶o~uŇčko~u; ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ¶iraraw to~u miko~uwanaj, ma ¶…ôfis ko~u ka…ĺańßakasi ma…ĺasiŇčsi, o~ujaan to~u ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, o~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôko~uan no~u to~u °as a pinaŇčan" . niti…ĺi…¨~…ģan *. *o~uńßn atkinso~un ńßo~ub~b~vso~un **** ****
